caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio, set within a clothing store. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The man is smiling and seems engaged in a conversation, possibly with someone off-camera. He holds a red cup in his hand, which he occasionally moves closer to the microphone. The background includes framed photographs on the wall, a mannequin dressed in a white shirt, and racks of clothes, indicating the dual-purpose space. The setting suggests a casual yet professional atmosphere, likely for a podcast recording titled "BOSS TALK 101," as indicated by the logo in the corner.
